title: Global Land-Use Change and Greenhouse Gas Emissions Due to Recent European Biofuel Policies

summary.about: How EU biodiesel caps and anti-dumping measures affect trade, land use and emissions worldwide.
summary.audience: EU energy, agriculture, trade and climate policymakers.
summary.method: Uses GTAP-BIO to simulate higher biodiesel demand and import prices as policy shocks.
summary.insights: Imports can rise despite trade measures, while demand shifts land use and emissions far beyond Europe through food and feed markets.
